info.title: JValleyVerse API
info.description: Community-driven learning platform with gamification, certification, showcase, and file upload features. Protected by rate limiting (Global 200/min, Content 60/min, Auth 10/min), anti-scraping (ScraperGuard), XSRF double-submit cookie + Origin/Referer fallback (SameSite=None, Secure=true), security headers, and idempotency keys for safe retry. Exposes Prometheus metrics at /metrics for monitoring with Grafana + Prometheus + Node Exporter.

credential.description: Google ID token from One Tap

get.description: Returns real-time status of all system dependencies (Database, Redis, MinIO). No auth required. Frontend can auto-refresh every 30s to display operational dashboard.

200.description: System status with per-service health checks

get.summary: Detailed health check with system metrics
Get course with sections and lessons
Get lesson by course and slug

parent_id.description: Parent reply ID for nested replies

get.description: Returns current learning streak count, longest streak, and last activity date. Streak auto-tracks when user completes lessons.
Aggregates certificates, showcases, and study cases for a user into a shareable portfolio page. No auth required.
Public endpoint to verify a certificate by its unique code. Returns certificate details including verification URL and QR code URL. No auth required.

learning_objectives.description: List of learning objectives for the course
List of learning objectives for the course

folder.description: Target folder: courses, lessons, avatars, showcases, study-cases
